project.title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane

receipts.project_title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane
receipts.claim_to_demonstrate: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
receipts.input_fixture: books, PDFs, Calibre records, manifests, root paths, source hashes, and status classes
receipts.operation_under_test: decides what belongs in the scholarly corpus, what is stable but unprocessed, what is committed, and what remains excluded or failed
receipts.expected_output: admitted corpus records plus holding, failed, and promotion states
acceptance_criteria: The input, operation, and expected output are all visible.
The evidence locator is present or the missing evidence is explicitly named.
The result supports the component claim without implying broader completion.
receipts.claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.

evidence.public_locator_note: Raw workstation paths are intentionally not reproduced in this share-safe receipt.

receipts.receipt_grade: P: package artifact and component anchor verified; live execution trace still required
receipts.falsification_rule: If no artifact, dataset, source packet, or run trace is attached, the component may not be presented as built beyond a proof plan.
receipts.next_strengthening_action: Promote from package-verified receipt to live proof by attaching one run trace, screenshot packet, or executable replay.

receipts.project_title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane
receipts.claim_to_demonstrate: moves from file identity toward work/edition/source identity so duplicate files do not masquerade as independent evidence
receipts.input_fixture: file paths, internal metadata, editions, duplicate candidates, OCR quality, genre signals, and source typology
receipts.operation_under_test: moves from file identity toward work/edition/source identity so duplicate files do not masquerade as independent evidence
receipts.expected_output: bibliographic identity record and authority-control warning surface

receipts.project_title: Scholarly Retrieval System — cross-disciplinary research library with a twelve-stage analytical-governance plane
receipts.claim_to_demonstrate: refuses or narrows answers when the corpus cannot support the requested claim; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
receipts.input_fixture: evidence packet, source support state, contradiction state, and user query
receipts.operation_under_test: refuses or narrows answers when the corpus cannot support the requested claim; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
receipts.expected_output: answer, qualified answer, follow-up search plan, or refusal
